name: Embervale Settlement
public_symptom: Visible routines run on time, but people with actual responsibility are shorter, more procedural, and quicker to redirect outsiders.
hidden_cause: Must keep throughput credible under conditions that reward deferral more than repair. Around Embervale Settlement, that usually means carrying overcrowding, sickness, heat-failure risk without letting the role of tundra crop and rite steward visibly slip.

if_ignored.1_day: Queues, tempers, and procedural shortcuts become more obvious.
if_ignored.1_week: Blame starts traveling between offices, crews, or patrons instead of being resolved at the source.
if_ignored.1_month: The locality begins treating strain as normal and bakes it into daily custom, enforcement, or supply rhythm.
